title: YOUTH SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT - 211info
text: LIFEWORKS NW HILLSBORO MAIN STREET YOUTH SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides alcohol and drug outpatient services for youth and their families, including integrated mental health services. Services are available in the community, including schools. Also provides a bilingual, culturally specific outpatient program for Latino youth and their families. 1340 E Main Street Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Ages 12-18 (19 if still in high school) and their families. Culturally specific program serves the Hispanic/Latino community. Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-7pm Email (503) 645-9010 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 645-9010 Intake (888) 645-1666 Toll-free Main phone (503) 597-6089 For follow-up calls Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for intake FEES: Varies by program. Nearly all LifeWorks Northwest programs accept OHP/Medicaid and Medicare. Some programs serve uninsured individuals on sliding scale. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Washington County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-7pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Blue MAX line to Stop 9842, north on 12th, right on Main Street (2-minute walk) Services: Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment * Adolescents Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment * Adolescents * Hispanic/Latino Community Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CHILDREN'S RELIEF NURSERY INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - STRENGTHENING FAMILIES PROGRAM MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - OUTPATIENT MENTAL HEALTH CARE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - PARENT-CHILD INTERACTIVE THERAPY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LIFEWORKS NW HILLSBORO MAIN STREET
